Function.Inference: Main loop body starting in F, ends with || at bar 36.
Key change to Ab, ends with a :| repeat at bar 56.

Section.Inference: Introduces the primary rhythmic motif and the main melody in F major.
Repeats the primary melodic core and rhythmic structure with slight harmonic variations.
Introduces a new contrasting melody that builds tension and leads to the key change.
Modulates to Ab with a triumphant new theme, followed by a turnaround back to the start.
